name: aiservices
display_name: AgentServices — Paid APIs for AI Agents
description: Paid data APIs for AI agents with built-in trust and x402 dispute resolution. Crypto prices, technical indicators, DeFi yields, Fear & Greed index, IP geolocation, URL metadata search, AI-powered dispute resolution with 7 policy templates, and marketing intelligence tools. Micropayments via x402 USDC on Base.

tools.name: crypto_prices
tools.description: Get current crypto prices for one or more symbols. FREE.

tools.name: technical_indicators
tools.description: Get technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands) for a crypto symbol. $0.02 via x402.

tools.name: defi_yields
tools.description: Get top DeFi yield pools ranked by TVL. $0.02 via x402.

tools.name: fear_greed
tools.description: Get crypto Fear & Greed sentiment index. FREE.

tools.name: ip_geolocation
tools.description: Get geolocation data for any IP address. FREE.

tools.name: url_metadata
tools.description: Extract metadata from a URL — title, description, images. $0.01 via x402.

tools.name: resolve_dispute
tools.description: Submit a dispute for AI-powered policy-driven ruling. 7 policy templates. $0.05 via x402.

tools.name: list_policies
tools.description: List all available dispute resolution policy templates. FREE.

tools.name: marketing_sentiment
tools.description: AI-powered brand sentiment analysis across platforms. FREE beta.

tools.name: marketing_trends
tools.description: Detect trending marketing topics in any industry. FREE beta.

tools.name: marketing_ad_copy
tools.description: Generate ad copy for Google, Meta, TikTok, or Taboola. FREE beta.
